alertBoost.title: Stronger alerts

edgeGlow.label: Screen edge glow
edgeGlow.sub: Pulses around your periphery (won't break your flow)

widgetExpand.label: Widget pop-out
widgetExpand.sub: The minibar expands into a card showing the posture and a tip

fullscreenToast.label: Center-screen toast
fullscreenToast.sub: Hardest to miss — briefly interrupts your flow

sound.label: Sound
sound.sub: A short tone (mind meetings and headphones)

focusMode.label: Focus mode
focusMode.sub: If you ignore a break reminder, nudge once more with a bolder prompt (never locks your screen)

forceMode.label: Force mode
forceMode.sub: If you ignore a break or posture-shift nudge, blur the screen to strongly prompt movement. It clears the moment you move, and fades on its own if you don't (never a lock)

alertBoost.hint: Fires when bad posture lasts {{secs}}s or more. The same posture has a 5-minute cooldown. The longer it lasts, the deeper the color and duration.

break.title: Break reminders
break.intro:
Holding even a good posture too long strains your discs and muscles.
BaroSit suggests staged movement and breaks based on continuous sitting time. It doesn't affect your posture score.

micro.label: Move suggestion (30 min default)
micro.sub: Shoulder shrugs, neck turns, deep breaths — a light toast

standup.label: Stand-up suggestion (50 min default)
standup.sub: KOSHA guideline — a 1-minute walk or stretch

deep.label: Long break suggestion (120 min default)
deep.sub: 5-minute break + a glass of water + 20-20-20 eye exercise

cumulative.title: Cumulative load alert
cumulative.intro:
Alerts when short bad-posture episodes pile up. Even if no single episode crosses the 5-second threshold, you'll get a move suggestion when the 30-minute window reaches 25% accumulation.
(based on the McGill & Callaghan disc-creep model)

variability.title: Posture variability alert
variability.intro:
Holding even a good posture too long builds up strain on one area.
If your shoulders and head barely move during the window, you get a "you've held one posture a while" nudge to change it.
(McGill — "best posture is the next posture")

adaptive.title: Adaptive sensitivity
adaptive.intro:
Your ability to hold posture naturally drops in the late afternoon and during long sessions.
BaroSit automatically relaxes posture thresholds and shortens break intervals.
(Bridger — postural muscle EMG fatigue curve)

enable.label: Enable adaptive sensitivity
enable.sub: Auto-adjusts for 2h+ sessions and 1–3 PM / 4–6 PM

adaptive.postureRelax: • Posture alert sensitivity: {{pct}}% relaxed (less sensitive)
adaptive.breakShorten: • Suggested break interval: {{pct}}% shorter (rest more often)
adaptive.idleHint: Your condition is good right now. Thresholds will be smoothly adjusted automatically during long continuous sessions (2+ hours) or afternoon fatigue windows (1–3 PM, 4–6 PM).

stretchCalib.title: Stretch calibration
stretchCalib.intro: Tune the detection criteria of each stretch to your own flexibility, or correct for a camera mounted at a side angle due to a multi-monitor setup.

privacy.title: Privacy

silhouette.label: Silhouette mode
silhouette.sub: Shows only the outline instead of video

privacy.note: Video never leaves this computer. Posture data is stored locally only.

errorReport.label: Automatic error reports
errorReport.sub: When the app crashes or errors, send anonymous diagnostics (error details, app version, environment) to help us fix it. No camera video or posture data is included.

usageAnalytics.label: Anonymous usage stats
usageAnalytics.sub: Anonymously measure where users get stuck to improve the product (e.g. calibration success/failure, return visits). No camera video, posture data, or personal info is included.

performance.title: Performance mode
performance.hint: Eco: Lowers detection frequency and the cadence of heavy face/hand recognition to greatly reduce CPU and memory use. Posture-alert quality stays nearly the same, but the silhouette view may be less smooth. Recommended for low-power laptops.

autostart.label: Launch at startup
autostart.sub: Turns on automatically when you log in

data.title: Data
data.hint: Back up and restore your score, history, baseline posture, and sensitivity as JSON. API keys are excluded for security.
data.clearConfirm: Clear all history? This can't be undone.
data.importConfirm: Importing data overwrites your current score, history, baseline posture, and settings with the backup file's contents. Continue?

appQuit.title: App
appQuit.hint: The X button on the main window only switches to widget mode. To quit completely, use the button above.

desktopApp.title: Desktop app
desktopApp.note: Background monitoring, tray alerts, and the floating widget are available only in the desktop app.

sync.title: Cloud sync
sync.networkNote: A corporate firewall, security policy, or network issue may be blocking the sync server. Core features like posture detection and alerts keep working, and syncing resumes automatically once the connection is restored.

feedback.title: Send feedback
feedback.desc: Tell us about bugs, friction, or features you'd like. Your camera video is never sent — only your app version and environment info are included.
feedback.placeholder: What went wrong? The more detail you share, the faster we can fix it.
feedback.sent: Thanks for the feedback — it came through!
